title: KernelPwn v1.8 is out!
body: A new module has been added that detects the DirtyClone Linux kernel vulnerability

title: SSHAgentJack
body: Here at gotr00t we're always up to no good.. but whats new? lulz. I made a post exploitation tool that discovers and hijacks live SSH agent sockets on a compromised Linux system, go check it out!

title: Nightmare Eclipse is back!
body: Church of Malware is now hosting Nightmare Eclipse exploits. Check it out for the latest releases!

title: KernelPwn v1.6 is out!
body: Added a new module for the One Character Linux kernel vulnerability to kernelpwn
